Aluminum 6061-T6.description: Standard aerospace aluminum. Good balance of weight and strength.

Titanium Grade 5.description: High temperature resistance and massive strength. Very heavy.

Carbon Fiber.description: Ultra-lightweight composite. Extremely strong but brittle.

Sitka Spruce.description: Aviation-grade wood. Flexible but low absolute strength.

Maraging Steel.description: Ultra-high-strength alloy used for landing gear and rockets. Extremely heavy but nearly unbreakable.
